ref: Abraham's servant bowed down and thanked the Lord.
text: Abraham sankpan'as la wʋm ban yɛl si'em la, ka igin teŋin Zugsɔb la tuon.
translated: Abraham was ninety-nine years old when he circumcised the flesh of his foreskin.

text: Ka Esau gban'e o suori lɛb Seir teŋin.
translated: Esau left and went to the land of Seir.

ref: When Noah sobered up and learned what his youngest son had done,
text: Ka Noa da nie gbɛɛmin ka ti baŋ o bikpaanr Ham niŋ o si'em la,
translated: When Noa and his younger sibling grew up and knew their father Ham and their mother,

ref: The Lord saw how bad the people on earth were and that everything they thought and planned was evil.
text: Ka Zugsɔb la da nyɛ nidib la tʋʋmbɛ'ɛd nɛ ba pʋtɛnda an bɛ'ɛd saŋa wʋsa si'em la,
translated: When the chief's people saw that the man was very strong and they could not overcome him in any way,

ref: All animals, birds, reptiles, and fish will be afraid of you. I have placed them under your control,
text: Bʋnkɔnbid wʋsa na zɔɔ ya dabiem, bʋnkɔnbid nɛ niis nɛ zimi nɛ banɛ vuud teŋin la wʋsa, bɔzugɔ m nɔki ba niŋi ya nu'usin,
translated: The elders said we should go home, the elders said that the person who is not tired should continue the work, I will come and meet you tomorrow.
